title: Better fabric
description: This modpack contains mods to optimize fps and adds QoL changes.
body:
What is Better fabric? Better Fabric is a fabric modpack designed to enhance the overall gameplay experience by incorporating QoL improvements and FPS optimizations.

This modpack is specifically built for clientside usage.
Why would you choose Better fabric? You might choose to use the Better fabric modpack for several reasons:
  • Improved Performance: The modpack contains FPS enhancing mods.
  • QoL Improvements: The modpack includes QoL improvements that can make your gameplay more enjoyable.
What are some mods included in this Modpack? List of some mods in this modpack:
  • Borderless Mining - Hides windows border in fullscreen mode,
  • ClearDespawn - Makes items about to disapear blink,
  • Sodium - A modern rendering engine which improves performance,
  • Capes - Mod to make optifine capes visible,
  • BetterPingDisplay - Displays players ping in ms,
  • Dynamic FPS - Limits FPS to 0 when Minecraft is in background,
  • etc..
